This repository contains two separate brands and they must stay separate.

General rules:
- Keep Keiki and Kanis Lupus fully distinct.
- Never mix their tone, audience, or goals.
- Keep all writing organized by folder.
- Save Keiki content only in the keiki folder.
- Save Kanis Lupus content only in the kanis-lupus folder.
- Keep copy concise, polished, and easy to reuse.
